AppShell.tsx.notes: All styling is inline. No className, no CSS variables from index.css. Nav hover #111827/#CBD5E1; health badge disabled: cursor default only, no visual distinction.

LoadingScreen.tsx.notes: Dark bg #080E1A diverges from AppShell page #F1F5F9. Logo borderRadius 10 vs AppShell 8. Wordmark fontSize 22 vs AppShell 15.

EmptyOrgGuide.tsx.notes: CTA: gradient, borderRadius 10, padding 12px 24px, fontSize 14, hover boxShadow. Disabled: flat #94A3B8 + cursor:not-allowed.

OrgReadyBanner.tsx.hoverMechanism: none — assign and dismiss buttons have no hover handlers
OrgReadyBanner.tsx.notes: Fixed bottom toast bg #0F172A, borderRadius 14. CTA flat #2563EB (not gradient), borderRadius 8, fontSize 12 — differs from EmptyOrgGuide CTA. Icon borderRadius 9 is unique value.

OrgHealthSummary.tsx.notes: MetricCard fontSize 22 for values. Warning tone uses #B45309 (value) and #D97706 (label) — two amber hues for same semantic tone.

DrillDownPanel.tsx.hoverMechanism: onMouseEnter/Leave inline — rows borderColor change; action divs have no hover
DrillDownPanel.tsx.notes: Close button uses literal '×' char, fontSize 16. Badge borderRadii 5 and 6 coexist for same badge type. Warning color #92400E differs from OrgHealthSummary warning #B45309.

SetupProgressCard.tsx.hoverMechanism: none — CTA and dismiss buttons have no hover handlers
SetupProgressCard.tsx.notes: fontSize 9 on step labels — smallest in Phase 5. Dark toast #0F172A borderRadius 14 parallels OrgReadyBanner but padding differs. CTA borderRadius 9 (unique). Dismiss uses literal '×' char.

index.css.notes: Tailwind v4 @import + @theme with HSL CSS variables (--background, --foreground, --radius, --font-sans: Inter). None of these tokens referenced by teamframe/* components.

crossFileSummary.primaryBackgrounds: #F1F5F9 (AppShell main), #EEF2F7 (TeamFrame STYLE.page — legacy conflict), #080E1A (LoadingScreen), #0B1220 (sidebar), #FFFFFF (cards/panels/header), #0F172A (dark toasts), #FAFAFA (DrillDownPanel rows)
crossFileSummary.mostFragmentedArea: Primary action buttons — gradient vs solid fills, borderRadius 8/9/10, fontSize 12/14, hover via boxShadow vs borderColor vs background vs none

topInconsistencies.issue: Tailwind + CSS token infrastructure exists in index.css but zero components use it
topInconsistencies.example: index.css defines --radius: .5rem and --color-primary. AppShell uses borderRadius: 8 and color: #2563EB inline with no className anywhere in teamframe/

topInconsistencies.issue: Competing page background colors — new AppShell (#F1F5F9) vs legacy TeamFrame STYLE.page (#EEF2F7)
topInconsistencies.example: AppShell main grid area: #F1F5F9. TeamFrame STYLE.page: background #EEF2F7. Visible mismatch on scroll edges and before AppShell fully renders.

topInconsistencies.issue: Primary button styling varies across 3 components with no shared definition
topInconsistencies.example: EmptyOrgGuide: gradient #2563EB→#1D4ED8, br 10, padding 12px 24px, fontSize 14, hover boxShadow | OrgReadyBanner: flat #2563EB, br 8, padding 8px 14px, fontSize 12, no hover | SetupProgressCard: gradient, br 9, padding 9px 0, fontSize 12, no hover

topInconsistencies.issue: 10 distinct font sizes with no scale object or token — 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 20, 22
topInconsistencies.example: SetupProgressCard step labels: 9. OrgHealthSummary metric values: 22. AppShell nav: 13. No file shares a typography constant.

topInconsistencies.issue: Zero keyboard focus styling across all interactive elements
files: all Phase 5 components with interactive elements
topInconsistencies.example: No onFocus, :focus, outline, or focus-visible anywhere in teamframe/*.tsx. Nav buttons, MetricCards, CTAs all lack focus affordance.
